title: Klitch Footwear Clip Sports Accessory, Hang Extra Shoes Cleats Boots or Gear on Your Bag. Works on Soccer, Baseball, Basketball, Track, Running Shoes, Flip Flops and More.
description: The Klitch is a footwear clip that allows you to hang extra sneakers or cleats to the outside of your bag. This avoids getting the inside of your bag dirty, smelly, and full. Great for anyone who plays sports, works out, or has an active lifestyle. The Klitch can be used for any type of footwear up to 10 lbs!
features: PATENTED: The Klitch Footwear Clip allows you to carry extra shoes outside your bag allowing your shoes to air out and the contents of your bag to stay clean and fresh!
QUICK & EASY: No more messy and difficult knots to tie or untie. Quickly and easily clamp and clip extra shoes or equipment to your bag with no fuss!
PERFECT FOR SPORTS: Great for soccer cleats, football cleats, baseball spikes, basketball shoes, track shoes, hiking boots, flip-flops and much more!
ON THE GO: Great for traveling, hiking, camping or organizing at home. Hang extra shoes or equipment in your garage, lockers, tents or shoe racks!
CUSTOMER FIRST: The Klitch Footwear Clip includes a 1-year full replacement when purchased through Klitch!

title: Brooks Women's Glycerin GTS 20 Supportive Running Shoe
features: Made in the USA or Imported
manmade sole

THIS WOMEN'S SHOE IS FOR: The Glycerin GTS 20 is perfect for runners who think there is no such thing as too much cushioning and but require additional support from our trusted GuideRails which offer innovative technology to help guide your body in its natural path of motion while keeping excess movement in check. Predecessor: Brooks Glycerin GTS 19. This Brooks Glycerin GTS 20 is a certified PDAC A5500 Diabetic shoe and has been granted the APMA Seal of Acceptance.

GREAT SUPPORT: The Glycerin GTS 20 is the more supportive version of the Glycerin 20. With its integrated GuideRails holistic support system, excess movement is kept in check to keep you moving comfortably while providing additional support beyond just the feet, to the most injury-prone part of a runner’s body: the knees.
MAXIMUM CUSHION AND SUPPORT: Provides maximum support while offering the maximum amount of cushioning. Ideal for road running, cross training, the gym or wherever you might want to take them!

SUPREME SOFTNESS: The ultimate in softness and supreme comfort, designed for runners who want pillowy soft cushioning. The Glycerin 20 with DNA LOFT v3 offers our softest cushioning optimized to be lightweight, responsive, and durable.
SMOOTH TRANSITIONS: New cushioning and redesigned outsole deliver smoother and more stable transitions for a supremely soft on-the-run experience that lets runners fully immerse in their miles.

description: Fall in love with the new Addiction 13. The BioMoGo DNA midsole provides adaptive cushioning, while the Extended Progressive Diagonal Rollbar guarantees stability and comfort. The Segmented Crash Pad allows a soft and flowing heel-toe transition. If you add to all this an extra-comfortable upper in perforated mesh for moisture transpiration, you will discover why these shoes are addictive, but without any unpleasant side effects. Features: The BioMoGo DNA midsole offers adaptive cushioning, the Crash Pad segmented along the entire length of the foot ensures smooth transitions, the Omega Flex Grooves improve flexibility, great for running on the road, ideal for those with medium arched feet / flat, ideal for those with moderate pronation, 12 mm thick midsole. reviews.title: Love these shoes
reviews.text: Very light weight and breathable. My favorite running shoes, I own several pair.

reviews.title: EXCELLENT SHOES RECOMMENDED BY PHYSICAL THERAPIST
reviews.text: I was recently diagnosed with Osteonecrosis and had to have a right total hip replacement due to collapsed hip socket.  My physical therapist recommended these for excellent support, mostly for my heel and ankle.  She was spot on.  Once the shoes were "broken in" they are wonderfully comfortable.  I did find them a bit tight across the top of my foot but gradually relaxed as I wore them.  I like that the tongues are also laced in.

reviews.title: Brooks is awesome yet again!
reviews.text: Love Brooks! My favorite running shows! They are consistently awesome no matter the model.

reviews.title: LOVE Brooks Tennies!!!
reviews.text: This is my third pair of Brooks and I’ll never buy anything else. They are SUPER comfy and SUPER durable. I have a history of Plantar Fasciitis (as many people who have worked 12-hr hosp shifts), and I’m EXTREMELY picky about my shoes. Brooks have EXCELLENT arch support. I require orthotics in most shoes that I wear, but not Brooks. I had my last pair for over 3 yrs of frequent wear. They are still structurally sound, but showing some cosmetic signs of wear. I bought this new pair for our 3-month trip in Europe. I have worn them for a week, and that is plenty to be assured that they are “broken in”. They are super comfy right out of the box!!

reviews.title: Great shoes for being in your feet. Lost a bit of cushion compared to previous versions.
reviews.text: I love Brooks and I’ve always worn Ravenna’s. I’m an ER nurse and I walk a lot, these are my go to work shoe. I wish there was a wee bit more arch support and I seem to feel they used to have more cushion overall, but an insert will make them perfect.

reviews.title: Best running shoe  yet!
reviews.text: I’ve tried a lot of shoes - Newtons, Brooks (Levitate), Hoka ( Clifton), Ons, Altras, Topos (Ultrafly), Mizunos (Hitogami), Adidas, etc. and these are the best. Most like the Hokas in terms of weight and comfort but with better arch.  While I still have my Brooks, Hokas, and Adidas in my shoe rotation these are the ones I use for my long runs. - context: 25 to 30 mile a week runner, 3 marathons, ~ 10 halfs, numerous 12 k and under distances.

title: ASICS Men's GEL Excite 3 Running Shoe
description:
The energetic design of the GEL-Excite™ 3 features a Rearfoot GEL® Cushioning System and breathable mesh upper for everyday comfort. This exciting update is a great choice for low mileage runners seeking a great fit and cushioned ride.
In 1949, Mr. Kihachiro Onitsuka began his athletic footwear company (Onitsuka Co., Ltd.) by manufacturing basketball shoes out of his living room in Kobe, Japan. He chose the name ASICS for his company in 1977, based on a famous Latin phrase "Anima Sana In Corpore Sano," which, when translated, expresses the ancient ideal of "A Sound Mind in a Sound Body." Taking the acronym of this phrase, ASICS was founded on the belief that the best way to create a healthy and happy lifestyle is to promote total health and fitness. Today, ASICS offers a full line of performance-driven athletic shoes and technical active sports apparel and accessories dedicated to bringing harmony to the body and soul.

THIS WOMEN’S SHOE IS FOR: The Launch 9 is for neutral runners who want a dependable, lightweight shoe with DNA cushioning and a highly breathable upper that helps runners go fast on every run. We recommend ordering Brooks running shoes 1/2 to one size larger than your dress shoe.
NEUTRAL SUPPORT: Lightweight, streamlined, with even more BioMoGo DNA cushioning, the Launch 9 offers neutral support to keep you running faster mile after mile.
ENHANCED BREATHABILITY: Reengineered upper features Creel Warp mesh, designed to be extremely lightweight and breathable. Hints of reflectivity on the upper to increase visibility on the road.

LIGHTWEIGHT CUSHIONING: We have added more BioMoGo DNA cushioning to the midsole for an even faster ride without the extra weight. A dynamically responsive ride for days when you are working on your speed.
RESPONSIVE TRANSITIONS: Redesigned midsole increased by 2 mm to provide runners with more responsiveness while the Green Rubber Outsole helps your foot move quickly from heel to toe.

reviews.title: Not sure if my feet grew... :)
reviews.text: I'm 55 and normally wear a 11.5 regular so that's what I ordered. My toes were super scrunched up and hitting the tip of the shoe, so I had to return them and order a half size up. They seem narrow in the front to me. Aside from that IMO they look better in the pics than in person but for the price I'm not going to complain too much. Seems like a solid shoe otherwise. The inserts seem to be glued in which is a bummer because I use orthotic inserts especially in my running shoes.

reviews.title: Who'd,thunk....these could be so comfortable
reviews.text: I have been wearing Asics for several years now and have been pleased. They do not last very long but they are comfortable and at about $50 per pair (always buy on sale) it is much cheaper then other name brands. I thought I would try the mid tops as I used to wear hightops in my early years. I am glad I did, they are very comfortable. So good that I just ordered a second pair (grey) as soon as I tried these coffee (brown) ones on. The grey ones are on sale for just $40 so its a no-brainer.

reviews.title: High top Asics
reviews.text: I've worn Asics for ever and was actually skeptical about buying since other reviewers that where Asics gave poor reviews. Well, in glad I bought them. I have always wanted Asics to make a high top and they finally did. These will make great trail shoes. I'm returning a pair of Merrells that didn't fit like old Merrells did. The Asics have built in stability for people with high arches. They are lightweight,  comfortable and fit like good shoes should. Asics didn't drop the bar as others complained, looks like the same high quality at reasonable prices they are known for.

reviews.title: Fits like a glove
reviews.text: Great shoe. Fits perfectly

reviews.title: Very Nice Quality for the Price
reviews.text: Fits perfectly.  Very easy to get on and off. So far, the soles appear to be wearing well. I walk on concrete and so far do not notice any appreciable wear.

reviews.title: Def buy these. 🖤
reviews.text: These are so comfortable and cuuuteee!!!

reviews.title: Disappointed
reviews.text: I really wanted to like these shoes. It's just completely uncomfortable.  There's no support. It feels cheap on. The side stripes are actually tighter than the rest of the shoe so it felt like my foot was being compressed. I have narrow feet and don't have the problem generally so it was very surprising to me. The heel is definitely higher thN the toe. I could feel that I was standing at an angle. I usually love adidas so I was pretty disappointed.

reviews.title: Great running shoes
reviews.text: Love the fit and feel of these shoes. I always buy ASICS but decided to spend the extra money these after a friend recommended them. They are super light, very comfortable, and great to run in.

reviews.title: Great fit for narrow feet!
reviews.text: This is my third pair of ASICS. The narrow fit is perfect for my feet. Not keen on the color, but it was the only color available.

reviews.title: GT2000 are always the best!
reviews.text: GT2000 are always the best! I tried something new last time and came back to these! 17 years running!

reviews.title: Perfect fit for my wide foot
reviews.text: Perfect. Wide size fits my fore foot with enough room in toe box. Longer shoestrings to accommodate extra width. Good arch support. Heel not too wide or too high like many are. Best fitting shoe Ive had on my foot in a while.

reviews.title: Colors are poppin in true Graffiti fashion
reviews.text: I usually wear a size 8 but since moving wear the climate is hot all year round I fit a size 9 more comfortably. This is why I am happy to write that the size 9 fit perfectly and the graffiti design is poppin with the colors. I am very happy with this purcahse.

reviews.title: x STYLISH AS ALL HELL x

title: New Balance Kids' 680 V6 Hook and Loop Running Shoe
description: The New Balance 680 v6 kids' running shoe is a sneaker that blends style and performance to satisfy both kids and adults alike. A modern design ups your little one's cool factor, featuring a no-sew construction for a sleek fit and feel that's snug and secure without being too tight, delivering both a comfortable fit and contemporary style. The streamlined silhouette on these running shoes for kids includes leather and mesh upper material with a stitched-down tip and foxing details for flexible support and lasting durability. These kids' performance shoes also include an ABZORB midsole that absorbs impact through a combination of cushioning and compression resistance, for a cushioned ride that takes kiddos from the classroom to the playground and everywhere in between. These comfortable kids' running shoes are available in a variety of colors that range from neutral to bold and bright, so your child can pick the one that suits their style and boosts their confidence.
features: Rubber sole
Power in Simplicity: The New Balance 680v6 running shoe for kids features a minimal leather and open mesh upper, offering flexible support and easy-breezy comfort
Modern Construction for an Outstanding Fit: The leather/mesh upper on these New Balance kids' running shoes features a stitched-down tip and foxing details to provide flexible support and durability
Soft Underfoot Cushioning: The ABZORB midsole absorbs impact through a combination of cushioning and compression resistance, giving these kids' running shoes a comfortable feel that lasts all day
Designed for Support and Durability: These kids' performance shoes feature a strong rubber outsole to offer long-lasting durability, built to stand up to daily use and playground wear-and-tear
Available in a Range of Colors: From neutral tones to bold hues, these cushioned running shoes for kids are available in a range of shades to suit the style and color preferences of your little one

reviews.title: Great for wide feet!
reviews.text: My son has bilateral clubbed feet, and he no longer wears braces but has a wide foot. New balance is the only brand that works for him. This particular model is perfect for him!

reviews.title: The best for extra wide feet
reviews.text: These shoes are perfect for my special needs child. He has extra wide feet and he has trouble with shoe tying.

reviews.title: Reviews are right about the quality
reviews.text: Wish I read the reviews more carefully. I’m so desperate to find shoes that fits my boys’ wide feet that I just assumed NB would be good because I’ve gotten them in the past. But no the quality is sub par. They are already falling apart and it’s only been 1.5 months. I’ll probably have to buy them new shoes soon which is a shame because it’s not like these are some off brand cheapies. You expect more from a company like NB.

reviews.title: 5 stars
reviews.text: These New Balance shoes are great. The insoles are so comfortable and I know that my little one is getting the protection that she needs for her growing feet. The shoes fit true to size, and they width is great. She has a normal foot, I wouldn't recommend them for a child with wide feet. They are comfortable to wear and look great. This particular style is great for young children due to the velcro. Most kids by the time they get to this style shoe CAN tie their own shoes, but its so much easier and quicker for them just to  be able to do the velcro and go!We love them.

reviews.title: Maybe I just got a defective pair of shoes...
reviews.text: The insoles don’t fit the shoes, nor were they glued in. So they kept sliding out. Nice looking shoe from a distance but they are falling apart.

reviews.title: Perfectos
reviews.text: Excelente regalo para mi pareja

reviews.title: Comfortable
reviews.text: These are really nice shoes and I’m glad I bought them. I get compliments ALL of the time on how nice they look, they stay clean too. I’m really surprised on how much I liked them, I had never owned any shoes by Adidas but I will continue to buy shoes from them if they’re this nice. I’m on my feet 12-13 hours a day working in healthcare I use profoot insoles with them and it gets the job done.

reviews.title: For a my teenage daughter
reviews.text: I bought this for my middle schooler daughter for school, but she use them all the time. They're comfortable, they look the same as the picture. I bought them about a month ago. I recommend them.

reviews.title: Sizing
reviews.text: I absolutely love these shoes! They run about a half of a size too big. I normally wear an 8.5,which is what I ordered. But these are definitely not an 8.5,more like a 9. The width of the 8.5 is good, if you have wider feet. Not sure how a correct size would fit the width. All around pretty good shoe for the money.

reviews.title: Great shoes!!
reviews.text:
Great shoe! My kiddo loves these. They are a good quality and fit perfect!
These are wayyyy better quality than anything Walmart has for a low price. I think they are a happy medium between Walmart and sketchers brand shoes. Considering how fast my kiddos go through sneakers I need quality and cheaper

reviews.title: hobibear boys shoe
reviews.text: 5 year old grandson chose these shoes online and loves them.  They are easy on and off... quite bright in color.  The sizing was spot on for us.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

reviews.title: Great kid shoes
reviews.text: Super cute shoes. I bought these for two of my girls and they’ve been wearing them all spring and loving them. If you don’t know what size to buy you should purchase a shoe sizer for home. I bought one years ago and I’m able to size my kids feet easily and accurately.the sizes of these shoes were spot on.

reviews.title: Kids like these
reviews.text:
My grandsons love these kind of shoes.
Kids go through shoes sooooo fast. Also, the fact they don't have to tie their shoes is convenient

reviews.title: Five Stars
